programme.title: Scorpion

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: When a nuclear-powered Russian satellite is knocked out of orbit, the new Director of Homeland Security reunites the team; Paige and Walter confront their feelings.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: When a woman from Cabe's past asks for help apprehending a war criminal, the members of Team Scorpion travel to Cuba.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Sylvester goes undercover in a federal prison in hope of saving three judges' lives; the team must orchestrate a prison break when Sylvester's life is threatened.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: An explosion sends a top-secret submarine to the bottom of the ocean with limited oxygen, a self-destruct function that's about to activate, and Walter, Cabe and Happy on board.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The members of the team go undercover on a movie set in Kazakhstan in hopes of disabling a Soviet-era nuclear missile being sold by terrorists.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team must intervene when Paige and Ralph are on a sabotaged, runaway subway train; Toby tries to impress Happy during his first boxing match.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The members of Team Scorpion take a lucrative job locating a top-secret aircraft in Area 51 for the CIA.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: The memories and skills of a deceased CIA agent are implanted into a dangerous convict.

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: An army pilot must travel through time using the 'Source Code' in order to identify a ruthless bomber.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: A group of retired secret agents reunite when they are targeted by mysterious assassins.

programme.title: Red 2
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses and his team of hapless heroes are tasked with finding a dangerous nuclear weapon

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop thought he had put his murderous past behind him when a foe kidnaps the love of his life.

programme.title: Jack's Back [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: In a sickening coincidence -- or a sinister homage to actual crimes -- women are being murdered in Los Angeles 100 years after Jack the Ripper terrorized London. Police think John Westford, a young doctor, is the murderer, and when he's found hanging from a noose, authorities believe his apparent suicide is a tacit admission of guilt. But his twin brother, Rick (also Spader), insists John was killed, and, when it appears Rick is right, the investigation takes a stunning turn.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Arlington Road [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Widowed when his FBI agent wife is killed by an extremist group, college professor Michael Faraday (Jeff Bridges) becomes obsessed with the culture of these groups -- especially when his new all-American neighbors, Oliver (Tim Robbins) and Cheryl Lang (Joan Cusack), start acting suspiciously. With each twist, the mystery deepens and questions loom whether Faraday is consumed by fear and driven by paranoia, or whether a lethal conspiracy has been born on Arlington Road.

programme.title: Marlowe
programme.desc: Bay City, down on his luck detective is hired to find the ex-lover of a glamorous heiress.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in.

programme.title: The Marksman
programme.desc: A rancher on the Arizona border becomes the unlikely defender of a young Mexican boy desperately fleeing the cartel assassins who've pursued him into the U.S.

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: A former DEA agent moves his family to a quiet town, where he soon tangles with a local meth druglord.

programme.title: Miracle On The Mountain: The Kincaid Family Story
programme.desc: A dysfunctional family must pull together to survive a plane crash in the wilderness.

programme.title: All The Pretty Horses
programme.desc: Two Texas cowboys head to Mexico in search of work, but soon find themselves in trouble with the law after one of them falls in love with a wealthy rancher's daughter.

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: In the midst of WWII a small group of art experts are commissioned by roosevelt as soldiers and sent to the european theater to protect historically important buildings and monuments, and to locate vast troves of priceless art looted by the nazis. Discovering art in castles and mines, they race against time as the nazis scramble to destroy everything they can.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Leaving a trail of captsized ships and demolished cities, a monstrous reptile known as Godzilla makes his way towards New York City. Seemingly imprevious to traditional weaponry, Godzilla will destroy Manhattan unless scientist Dr. Nick Tatopolous and mysterious French insurance investigator Philippe Roache discover how to stop the monster s rampage. GODZILLA is directed by Roland Emerich and written by Dean Devlin, the team behind INDEPENDENCE DAY.

programme.title: The Wackiest Ship In The Army
programme.desc: During WW II, Lt. Rip Crandall commands the USS Echo, a run-down ship with the archetypal inexperienced, motley crew, assigned to deliver an Australian observer to a Japanese-held island.

programme.title: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: IN COLD BLOOD dramatizes actual events and people in a realistic, technically well-crafted fashion, based upon Truman Capote s novel. The movie is a faithful docudrama about the real-life mass murder of the Clutter family, which took place in Holcomb, Kansas on November 15, 1959 by two psychopathic killers.

programme.title: Easy Rider
programme.desc: A landmark road film, EASY RIDER chronicles the search for freedom by two motorcycle-riding drifters (Peter Fonda and Dennis Hopper) who meet up with alcoholic lawyer, Jack Nicholson in a southern jail. Nicholson gets them out and then joins them on their liberating journey.

programme.title: Anatomy Of A Murder
programme.desc: When his flirtatious young wife (Lee Remick) claims she was raped, an army lieutenant (Ben Gazzara)kills her attacker and hires small-town lawyer James Stewart to defend him.

programme.title: Lazy Susan
programme.desc: Susan (Hayes) has always been the self-centered oddball in her family who lazily skated through life with their begrudging support until one day she wakes up to realize she's middle-aged with no job, no relationship, and an increasingly estranged family. She finally decides to take charge and turn things around, but never having done anything herself before, the struggle is real (and hilarious) as Susan becomes the woman she always wanted to be, all on her own.

programme.title: Agent Red
programme.desc: Captain Matt Hendricks and Dr. Linda Christian are locked in a submarine with Russian terrorists that threaten to launch a chemical virus on US territory.

programme.title: Downfall
programme.desc: Traudl Junge, the final secretary for Adolf Hitler, tells of the Nazi dictator's final days in his Berlin bunker at the end of WWII.

programme.title: Lawnmower Man 2: Beyond Cyberspace
programme.desc: They thought they had destroyed him, but the gardener-turned-superkiller has found a way to reboot himself..

programme.title: Dominique
programme.desc: A trained assassin flees her troubled past to begin a new life, but soon finds herself in a violent town.

programme.title: A Vigilante
programme.desc: After escaping her dangerous husband, a woman turns avenger to help victims of domestic abuse.

programme.title: The Protege
programme.desc: A contract killer ventures out to avenge her mentor’s murder.

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: Anna Poliatova will unleash indelible strength and skill to become one of the world’s most feared assassins.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Prey of Wrath
programme.desc: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Sakra
programme.desc: Accused of murder, a martial artist goes on the run in search of answers about his own mysterious origins and the unknown enemies out to destroy him.

programme.title: Enter the Fat Dragon
programme.desc: A police officer investigates the mysterious death of a suspect who was in his custody during a routine transfer.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: A former soldier is recruited for his toughest mission yet -- teaching a class of teen delinquents. As he kicks his way into their school and home lives, it becomes clear that his unconventional teaching style might be just what they need.

programme.title: Legend of the fist
programme.desc: Chen fakes his death and returns as a caped crime fighter.

programme.desc: Ella, 12, faces change 2 years after mom's death as dad starts dating.

programme.desc: Nicole learns stepfather Matthew died, mother Kate arrested.

programme.desc: Casey Anthony's former jail mate reveals how the two forged a deep friendship.

programme.desc: For Richard and Ellie, everything changes when their daughter doesn't return home.

programme.desc: Ella, 12, faces change 2 years after mom's death as dad starts dating.

programme.title: To Kill a Stepfather

programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Anna Nicole
programme.desc: Biopic of Anna Nicole Smith, Playmate and TV personality, culminates in a tragic fatal drug overdose.

programme.title: Crimes Of The Mind
programme.desc: A woman spends five years trying to get her brainwashed daughter back from a cult.

programme.title: Unthinkable
programme.desc: A cop trying to solve her the murder of daughter-in-law is drawn into a cat-and-mouse game with the killer.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: Traffickers
programme.desc: Tiffany Cooper, disgraced by the military, wanted by the cops and running out of time, stops at nothing to take down a Trafficking Operation and save these young girls. Nothing is what it seems when everyone seems to be against you. Trust No One.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: The Undeserving
programme.desc: Harper, a cold-blooded assassin, botches a hit on the wrong target. Hunted by her employer, she's forced to confront her past trauma. Follow her descent into darkness as she tries to survive and escape the consequences of her actions.

programme.title: Against all Odds
programme.desc: David, a young man reeling from his brother's death and his family's financial ruin, finds himself adrift. Rejected by his father, he turns to a local criminal for quick cash, only to find himself trapped in a dangerous web of deceit and violence. Now, David must fight to escape and protect his family before it's too late. The clock is ticking, and the stakes are higher than ever.

programme.title: Something Old
programme.desc: With her wedding days away, Kara agrees to meet her ex, Malik, for what she swears is just one last goodbye. But Malik isn’t looking for closure—he wants her back, and he’s not taking no for an answer. What starts as a simple meetup at a hotel turns into a dangerous game of obsession and control. As Kara’s fiancé Jordan uncovers the truth with help from her maid of honor, time’s running out.

programme.title: Vices
programme.desc: Simone, a married woman battling anxiety and the lingering shadow of her past alcoholism, escapes to collect her thoughts. When a storm isolates her in her remote cabin, she’s hunted by two forces: the seductive pull of her past addiction, and a cunning serial killer. Surrounded by a web of lies and sin, Simone must face her inner demons before a literal one ends her life.

programme.title: For All Have Sinned
programme.desc: After the sudden death of his mother, Mano embarks on a violent path that stems from his grief and causes him to spiral. He lives by the mantra of Romans 3:23 “for all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God.” When a local church members attempts to reach him, he finds a way to navigate his pain and grief.

programme.title: San Andreas Mega Quake
programme.desc: The "Big One" will sink California into the ocean, and scientists must stop by triggering a volcanic eruption.

programme.title: Geo-Disaster
programme.desc: A family must survive a volcano, earthquake, and tornado converging, forming an unprecedented cataclysm.

programme.title: Top Gunner: Danger Zone

programme.desc: A family is detained, and a young girl's distressing symptoms quickly escalate without her medication. Then, when the dead rise from their graves, townspeople take justice into their own hands.

programme.desc: After the death of a loved one, a drinking habit becomes insatiable. Then, dolls are Evie's favorite companions, but when a severed toy head appears in her dollhouse, Evie can no longer protect them.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A platoon of American soldiers finds something more sinister than war behind enemy lines. Then, a man with a passion for found objects finds something particularly odd: a finger ... and it's growing.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Teens who go trick-or-treating are met with fear instead of smiles and sweets. Then, Justin brings home the wrong suitcase and is shocked to find a living man stuffed inside.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.desc: A notorious killer is being held in the North Fork jail. When word gets around that Gordo's gang is on its way to free him, the whole town becomes frightened.

programme.desc: Lucas's old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: Daring Danger
programme.desc: Tim McCoy is nearly killed in a fight with Alexander. He recovers and goes after the bad man, catching up to him and finding that he has taken up with a rustler. Of course, McCoy now has to go after the rustler, too. The film is based on a story by William Colt MacDonald.

programme.title: Streets Of Ghost Town
programme.desc: Starrett and Burnette, along with Andrews, are looking for one million in gold left in a ghost town. When not battling ghosts, they review in flashback the story of how the gold got there and how the gang stole it.

programme.title: The Black Dakotas
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a Rebel spy poses as a Yankee to steal gold the Sioux have promised to the Northerners.

programme.title: Prairie Schooners
programme.desc: Bill Elliott plays the western legend, Wild Bill Hickok, in this routine adventure about a group of settlers who leave Kansas for a go at the wilderness of Colorado. They come up against a band of Indians who don't want any more white settlers on their land.

programme.title: Reprisal!
programme.desc: A Native American passing as white squares off against a bigoted ranching family on the Oklahoma frontier.

programme.title: The Quick Gun
programme.desc: A gunslinger helps an ungrateful town fight off a raid by his former gang.

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Roy Rogers's beloved horse Trigger is stolen and held for ransom money. Will Roy find $100,000 to get his faithful companion back, or will he find a way to trap the gang holding the horse hostage? Along with Roy and Trigger, you'll find Andy Devine as Cookie Bullfincher, and young Michael Chapin as Ted Carver, a gallant boy who helps reunite Roy with the smartest horse in show business!

programme.title: Cowboy And The Prizefighter
programme.desc: Red Ryder takes Steve Stevenson, who has saved his life, to his ranch and gives him a job. Red's aunt, the Duchess, knew Steve's father, who supposedly committed suicide after losing his ranch betting on a prizefight. Steve refuses to believe that his father took his own life, suspecting he was murdered. Red and Little Beaver aid Steve in finding his father killer.

programme.title: Hell Town
programme.desc: In Hell Town (aka Born to the West) John Wayne is back in the saddle as two-fisted Dare Rudd, a roaming cowhand trying to prove he can win a woman's love and outwit a crooked saloon owner. This exciting B-movie from Paramount Pictures was based on a novel by western writer Zane Grey. With a wild and wooly cast that includes Johnny Mack Brown, Marsha Hunt, Monte Blue, and Lucian Littlefield, director Charles Barton (Abbott and Costello Meet Frankenstein) gives us a tale of romance, action, and high stakes gambling!

programme.title: In Old Colorado
programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy and his crew get involved in a war over water rights in this feature from Harry Sherman Productions and Paramount Pictures. The intrigue starts when crafty Joe Weller (Morris Ankrum) turns two ranchers against each other, which leads to dire results. This is the 33rd of 66 Hopalong Cassidy movies, with WIlliam Boyd in the role he made famous. Also, look for regular Hoppy co-stars Russell Hayden as Lucky Jenkins, and Andy Clyde as California Carson.

programme.title: Hoppy Serves a Writ
programme.desc: Sheriff Hopalong Cassidy triumphs again in this lighthearted western romp from Harry Sherman Productions. Good ol' Hoppy (William Boyd) has to leave his beloved Texas to track down some bad guys in Oklahoma. You can bet that the action and suspense will follow Hopalong wherever he goes. Also, look for a number of familiar faces in the ast, including TV's future Superman George Reeves, notorious Hollywood heavy Victor Jory, and in his first credited role, Robert Mitchum! In fact, Mitchum would appear in more of Hoppy's adventures before branching out on his own and becoming one of Hollywood's greatest stars. Also featuring Jan Christy, Forbes Murray, Byron Foulger, Earle Hodgins, and Roy Barcroft. Directed by Goerge Archainbaud.

programme.title: The Light of Western Stars
programme.desc: Knights of the sage-brush roar across the plains in this western drama from Harry Sherman Productions. Victor Jory ( Papillon, Gone With The Wind), stars as a ranch foreman wrongly arrested for murder. The memorable cast includes Tom Tyler (Stage Coach, Adventures of Captain Marvel), plus Noah Beery Jr (The Rockford Files) and in one of his earliest feature roles, Alan Ladd (The Blue Dahlia, Shane).

programme.title: Riders of the Deadline
programme.desc: The 50th of 66 Hopalong Cassidy films finds Hoppy in a vengeful mood. When his good friend Tim Mason is unjustly sent to jail and then killed when trying to escape, Hoppys bitterness gets him drummed out of the Texas Rangers. With the help of his pals California Carson and Jimmy Rogers, he sets out to expose the real culprits and clear Tims name. The usual cast is here, including William Boyd as Hoppy, plus Andy Clyde, Jimmy Rogers, and in one of his earliest roles, Robert Mitchum.

programme.desc: The Monster Jam action intensifies as elite drivers push their trucks to the edge in a high-energy showdown packed with momentum swings and jaw-dropping saves. programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts celebrate their 25th show milestone with guest Chadwick Boyd, who elevates the classic Green Bean Casserole with caramelized onions, fresh beans, and a gruyere drop biscuit topping. While the casserole bakes, the crew debates mashed potato techniques, and Michael shares a hilarious story about how an AI misread his pan wall photo. A fan wins a Caraway pan set.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: A Fan Fridge rescue mission unfolds when a hypothetical Thanksgiving goes wrong. Michael Symon saves the day using Tammy's fridge ingredients to create a savory skillet of chicken thighs, Italian sausage, and sweet peppers. Meanwhile, the hosts share their current TV binges, Michael explains the meanings behind his tattoos, and Clinton sings "Brandy" for a fan. The episode wraps with a giveaway of Carla's measuring bowls.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Danielle Sepsy of The Hungry Gnome joins the kitchen to bake her famous, plush Honey Corn Muffins. As the muffins bake, Clinton and Danielle test Carla and Michael's Long Island accents in a hilarious roleplay game. They also play Chew It or Screw It, share Thanksgiving food disaster stories, and give away a $75 gift card to Danielle's bakery to a fan in Virginia.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Kicking off Thanksgiving week, Clinton Kelly prepares a seasonal Delicata Squash Salad with goat cheese and pepitas. As the crew enjoys the autumn flavors, they discuss Thanksgiving versus Friendsgiving, dive into a comprehensive timeline for holiday prep, and give away a prize to a lucky fan from Oregon.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving Eve, and Carla Hall takes the stress out of holiday cooking with her fast and flavorful Turkey Scallopini topped with a Cranberry Gastrique. The hosts share their best organizational tips, including Michael's famous oven grid and platter sticky notes. The trio also swaps hilarious stories about cooking under pressure and celebrity encounters.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon, Carla Hall, and Clinton Kelly welcome acclaimed Miami chef Michelle Bernstein to a special Miami Beach episode of Chewed Up filmed at the W Hotel in partnership with Experience Miami Beach. After sampling local bakery favorites including guava pastries and tequeños, the hosts celebrate Miami’s vibrant culinary scene and discuss Michelle’s lasting impact on South Florida food culture as she shares stories about her career, mentorship, and being honored during the South Beach Wine & Food Festival’s 25th anniversary celebration. Michelle then teaches the group how to make her signature Cuban sandwich empanadas, transforming the classic Miami staple into a crispy handheld pastry filled with lechón, ham, cheese, pickles, and yellow mustard. As they assemble and fry their empanadas, the conversation ranges from Cuban sandwich authenticity and Latin food traditions to family roots and restaurant life. The group also plays a lively round of “Chew It or Screw It,” debating topics such as late dinner reservations, over-tipping, flip-flops at fine dining restaurants, poolside rosé, and afternoon Cuban coffee. During Fan Mail, they answer viewer questions about cooking with candied jalapeños, discuss which decade they would most like to have grown up in, and share their favorite ways to unwind after a long day. The episode wraps with the hosts tasting Michelle’s empanadas, praising the crisp dough and balanced flavors, while Michelle shares details about her new restaurant, La Cañita. Two audience giveaways are awarded before the hosts encourage viewers to experience everything Miami Beach has to offer.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this Fan Fridge episode, Michael Symon battles a stubborn blender to create a Whipped Cottage Cheese Dip with crispy mortadella chips. The crew embraces the pre-holiday scramble, sharing funny stories about morning commutes and paper cuts.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: During "holiday reset week," Clinton Kelly bakes a festive Stromboli Wreath in a bundt pan. The hosts discuss their vastly different childhoods, play "Holiday Do or Don't," and Michael shares a hilariously horrifying mix-up involving the Hotel Chelsea in New York.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In the debut episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon welcomes viewers into his Venice, California front yard alongside his wife Liz Symon and their friend Olivia Annacone Cisic for an unfiltered, laid-back cookout. Celebrating Cinco de Mayo, Michael prepares simple yet flavorful black cod fish tacos on a plancha, walking through his approach to seasoning, cooking fish by sight, and building a bright, crunchy slaw with cabbage, citrus, and charred poblanos. The conversation flows easily as the trio shares cooking tips, debates ingredients like corn versus flour tortillas, and jokes about knife sharpening habits, cilantro preferences, and home cooking realities. Liz complements the meal with a refreshing jalapeño margarita, balancing heat with fresh lime juice, simple syrup, and a hint of orange liqueur, while adding her own creative twist with lemon and bitters. Throughout the episode, the group emphasizes flexibility in cooking—encouraging viewers to adjust flavors, garnishes, and spice levels to their own tastes. Lighthearted banter continues as they assemble tacos, discuss plating ideas, and highlight optional additions like crema and avocado. The episode wraps with a taste test, enthusiastic reactions to both the tacos and cocktail, and a reminder that great food doesn’t have to be complicated—just fresh, simple, and made with joy.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon grills a spatchcock chicken with avgolemono sauce in his Venice Beach front yard, joined by his wife Liz and co-host Liv. The episode features a lavender lemon drop martini and explores grill techniques for perfectly crispy, juicy poultry.

programme.title: Chewed Up

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques suggests that mastering simple skills and techniques will make your life easier and when you’re comfortable in the kitchen, you’ll be more creative and avoid the trap of a quick fix with a frozen meal…or worse! He teaches you how to sharpen knives, cut and prepare vegetables and eggs and finally make a delicious gratin.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacues knows that most of us want to eat a healthy diet with lots of organic produce. Now so much is available at farmers markets and in grocery stores, you don’t have to spend a fortune if you chose what’s in season when it tastes the best. But for those times you’re in a hurry, it’s okay to grab prewashed, precut or frozen vegetables to make your life easier.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques shows that with a well-stocked pantry and a few good cooking techniques, you can make a tasty dish or a simple meal. His pantry essentials include potato flakes for a simple soup, spaghetti for a quick main dish, lentils, canned salmon, polenta and finally, in the freezer, a poundcake that can be transformed into a celebration dessert.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Gathering with family and friends around the table or for a game of boules is the life’s greatest pleasure for Jacques. He makes chicken wings, cucumber soup, merguez sausage, zucchini canapes, hummus and his father’s Fromage Fort. Simple food that can be made ahead means that you can enjoy a glass of wine with your company.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves seafood and feels lucky to live by Long Island Sound with its wonderful stocks of Atlantic fish and shellfish. He prepares scallops, crab and cod––raw, fried, sauteed or grilled in dishes that are quick, simple and delicious.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia's granddaughter Julia joins her in the kitchen to prepare a large pot of bubbling polenta and crostini with mixed mushrooms and cheese which is a perfect starter to any meal.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Today Lidia starts with an American favorite - a crunchy, cheese Caesar salad. Her lemon roasted chicken is paired with onions, rosemary and lots of lemons. Finally she prepares a free form crostata with juicy plums.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia makes a simple Margherita style pizza and another version topped with prosciutto. Her fresh and crunchy salad is made with cucumbers, string beans and potatoes. For dessert, she serves peaches and blueberries soaked in prosecco.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia makes an orecchiette with clams and zucchini. Her spaghetti Caruso is made with a hearty sauce of mixed mushrooms, tomatoes, peas and chicken livers.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia creates three new pasta dishes that everyone will love including a linguine with Swiss chard that is made with walnuts and creamy ricotta.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Fresh pasta is an Italian family tradition passed through the generations. Today she starts with a silky pappardelle pasta dressed with pesto made from walnut, basil and parsley. She then takes the same pasta dough and shapes it into tortelloni stuffed with spinach and ricotta, dressed with a classic marinara sauce.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Today Lidia shows how to perfectly prepare delicious seared steak with rosemary sauce, shallots and mushrooms.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Focaccia is an irresistible, crunchy Italian flatbread. It's great for sandwiches and even for stuffing. Lidia begins by making a classic rosemary and lemon focaccia; she then moves on to a filled focaccia with smoky speck and fontina cheese. To finish these two lunchtime and snack favorites, she creates a salad of shrimp, fava, and cranberry beans.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: If there were another name for Lidia's family, it would be the gnocchi family. Lidia starts with a butternut squash gnocchi that is as soft as a feather and served with a velvety sage and butter sauce. Next, she prepares a marinated bread of chicken seared with shiitake mushrooms, rosemary, and sage. Her sauteed earthy Brussels sprouts are made with pepperoncino, garlic, and walnuts.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue Takes Flight: What’s America’s most popular meat? It’s Poultry. Americans consume more than 112 pounds per person each year. Today Steven prepares an astonishing array of grilled poultry from brandy brined rotisserie chicken to duck legs flame roasted Peking-style. And with a special guest a Project Fire first: turkey “ribs”—found in St. Louis, and virtually nowhere else.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a man is sent to a holding cell after hurling racial insults. In Reno, NV A man outfitted in just his underwear is taken into custody for battery of a police officer. In Portland, OR an intoxicated eldery man breaks into song during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A cologne salesman boasts and promotes his "magic potion". A man bloodies his neighbor in a one-sided feud. Taking an illegal drug has an unexpected consequence to one man’s face. Open Booking becomes a stage as one woman launches her singing career.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: After cutting her head, a woman bites and kicks deputies. To investigate potential hidden meanings, a man’s tattoos are examined. A confused man is found with illegal mushrooms at a bus stop.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman is charged with possession of a controlled substance. A woman denies assaulting her husband, and two aggressive cousins threaten police and end up in isolation.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers find hidden drugs on a burglary suspect during a pat down that leads to a tense confrontation. A beer sets off a fight between a mom and her daughter causing one family member to end up in jail. A rare event takes place in the county jail - a woman arrested for a warrant is in a good mood. Punching a pit bull while drunk lands in man in jail where he comes face to face with a childhood hero.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL a man is busted for an open container of beer. In Salt Lake City, UT a woman is stunned as to how drug paraphernalia wound up on her person. In Las Vegas, NV a former bus driver relays sad details about his past. In Portland, OR a shoplifter receives some sage of wisdom from one of the officers.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Inmates are subdued after exhibiting unruly behavior. Anger drives emotions as a man accuses officers of racial profiling. An officer uses “verbal judo” to gain the upper hand with combative inmates.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate's flirting calms a jailhouse fight. An inebriated man tries to avoid his eighth DUI by claiming his car was stolen, and a disagreement over Faecbook puts a couple in jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate claims to be the victim of an internet scam which led to his arrest. Officers take it easy on a rowdy inmate struggling through a spiritual crisis. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Acts of aggression cause a man to be placed in a restraint chair. Jail lockdown occurs after an inmate is stabbed with a pencil. After being booked for road rage a woman unleashes a venomous tirade.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man attempts to eat marijuana in jail. The Special Detention Unit investigates forbidden letters hidden amongst inmates. A bloody, vicious brawl escalates between an imprisoned duo.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An eccentric jail regular is welcomed back. Man fleeing Mexico details the horrors he escaped. Young woman describes her lucrative fling as a stripper. A woman finds that trying to drink away a bad boyfriend and then asking the boyfriend for bail money is not a good idea. A man collapses during booking after being arrested for drunk driving. Officers have heart to heart with a depressed inmate going through a breakup with a cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Needles are found on one woman while a stun gun is discovered on another. A DUI test stirs up bad memories for a man driving while intoxicated, and a convicted murderer becomes violent.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Reno, NV a woman becomes violent with officers after having over indulged in boxed wine. In Salt Lake City, UT a drunk man is brought in for urinating in front of a family restaurant and in attempt to expedite his release he requests that the officers "git 'er done". In Reno, NV a former marine is taken in to custody for domestic abuse.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An angry man refuses to cooperate during the booking process. A man claims to be part of the “international police”.

programme.desc: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena – but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.
